notes: This hand-drawn lymphatic diagram has very legible handwriting and clear color coding, so most models OCR'd all text (title, six labels, four function bullets) perfectly. The differentiators are: (1) the two grey smudges - only qwen3.5-9b-Q8|nothink correctly identified both, qwen3-vl-4b caught one, others missed them; (2) the red vertical margin line - only gemma4-12b, glm-4.6v-flash-9b, qwen3-vl-4b, qwen3.5-4b-nothink, and qwen3.5-9b-nothink mentioned it; (3) hallucination - gemma4-e4b-Q8|think claimed the title appears twice and described the figure as 'semi-transparent', both clearly wrong, putting it last. The top tier (qwen3.5-9b-nothink, qwen3.5-4b-nothink, glm-4.6v-flash-9b, gemma4-12b) produced near-perfect descriptions with all verbatim text, accurate colors, and correct physical details. Notably the two nothink Qwen3.5 variants outperformed their think counterparts, consistent with the project's documented finding that hybrid thinkers benefit from --disable-thinking on vision tasks.
